owner.subtext: Electronics and Communication Engineering student with practical knowledge of embedded systems, Arduino, microcontrollers, PCB design, and electronic circuit development. Passionate about embedded technology, IoT, and hardware-software integration.

about.title: Hello!
about.introduction: I am DEVANAND, a embedded engineer with practical knowledge of Java, Dart, Flutter, and frontend development. I build responsive web applications, mobile apps, and user-friendly digital solutions.
